title: SQL Server SA Account Brute Force Attack
description: Detects multiple failed login attempts for SA account
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%sa%' AND Message LIKE '%Password did not match%'

title: SQL Server Failed SA Login from Known Malicious IP
description: Detects failed SA login from IP 10.23.23.9
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%10.23.23.9%' AND Message LIKE '%Password did not match%'

title: SQL Server Failed Login - Multiple Attempts
description: Detects multiple failed SQL Server login attempts from same IP
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=18456 AND Message LIKE '%unexisting-user%' AND Message LIKE '%10.23.23.9%'

title: SQL Server SQL Auth Attempt - Windows Auth Only
description: Detects attempt to use SQL authentication when server requires Windows authentication
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=18456 AND Message LIKE '%Windows authentication only%'

title: SQL Server Failed Login - Brute Force Pattern
description: Detects 5+ failed logins within 10 seconds from same IP
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=18456 AND Message LIKE '%10.23.23.9%' GROUP BY Computer HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5

title: SQL Server Server Audit Specification Disabled
description: Detects when server audit specification is disabled
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%SERVER AUDIT SPECIFICATION%' AND Message LIKE '%STATE = OFF%'

title: SQL Server Server Audit Specification Deleted
description: Detects when server audit specification is dropped/deleted
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%DROP SERVER AUDIT SPECIFICATION%'

title: SQL Server Server Audit Deleted
description: Detects when server audit is dropped/deleted
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%DROP SERVER AUDIT%'

title: SQL Server Server Audit Destroyed
description: Detects when server audit object is destroyed
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%destroyed%'

title: SQL Server SA Account Enabled
description: Detects when SQL Server SA account is enabled
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%ALTER LOGIN [sa] ENABLE%'

title: SA Account Enable by admmig
description: Detects SA enabled by OFFSEC\admmig user - known compromised account
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%admmig%' AND Message LIKE '%sa%' AND Message LIKE '%ENABLE%'

title: SQL Server Database Audit Disabled
description: Detects when database audit specification is disabled
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%ALTER DATABASE AUDIT SPECIFICATION%' AND Message LIKE '%STATE = OFF%'

title: Database Audit Tampering in Specific DB
description: Detects audit tampering in RCS-TEST-db database
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%RCS-TEST-db%' AND Message LIKE '%STATE = OFF%'

title: SQL Server Database Audit Deleted
description: Detects when database audit specification is deleted
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%DROP DATABASE AUDIT SPECIFICATION%'

title: Complete Database Audit Tampering Chain
description: Detects complete database audit tampering chain
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND (Message LIKE '%STATE = OFF%' OR Message LIKE '%DROP DATABASE AUDIT SPECIFICATION%')

title: BitLocker Encryption - Any Channel
description: Detects BitLocker encryption events regardless of channel.
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID IN (4122, 840, 817, 796, 793, 780, 775, 768)

title: Defender Health Check - Baseline (All Enabled)
description: Baseline detection for fully enabled Windows Defender
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=1151 AND RTPstate='%%901' AND OAstate='%%901' AND IOAVstate='%%901' AND BMstate='%%901'

title: Defender Never Performed Full Scan - Warning
description: System has never completed a full Defender scan - may be new or security gap
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=1151 AND Lastfullscanage='4294967295'

title: Defender Outdated Signatures - Warning
description: Defender signatures are more than 7 days old
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=1151 AND (CAST(LastAVsecurityintelligenceage AS INTEGER) > 7 OR CAST(LastASsecurityintelligenceage AS INTEGER) > 7)

title: Defender Real-Time Protection Disabled - CRITICAL
description: Real-time protection is disabled - security tool tampering detected
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=1151 AND RTPstate!='%%901'

title: Defender Any Component Disabled
description: One or more Defender components are disabled
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=1151 AND (RTPstate!='%%901' OR OAstate!='%%901' OR IOAVstate!='%%901' OR BMstate!='%%901')

title: Defender Product Status Anomaly
description: Unusual Defender product status code
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=1151 AND Productstatus NOT IN ('0x00080000', '0x00080060', '0x00080080')

title: SQL Server xp_cmdshell Enabled - Critical
description: Detects when xp_cmdshell is enabled in MS SQL Server
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=15457 AND Message LIKE '%xp_cmdshell%' AND Message LIKE '%1%'

title: SQL Server RECONFIGURE Applied
description: Detects RECONFIGURE statement execution to apply configuration changes
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%RECONFIGURE%' AND Message LIKE '%ALST%'

title: Complete xp_cmdshell Attack Chain
description: Detects full attack chain: xp_cmdshell enabled + RECONFIGURE
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE (EventID=15457 AND Message LIKE '%xp_cmdshell%' AND Message LIKE '%1%') OR (EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%RECONFIGURE%' AND Message LIKE '%ALST%')

title: xp_cmdshell Change by Domain User in master DB
description: Detects xp_cmdshell configuration change in master database by domain user - high confidence IOC
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%database_name:master%' AND Message LIKE '%action_id:ALST%' AND Message LIKE '%session_server_principal_name:%\\%'

title: SQL Server CLR Enabled - Lateral Movement
description: Detects CLR enablement in SQL Server, used for lateral movement and backdoors
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=15457 AND Message LIKE '%clr enabled%1%'

title: SQL Server Advanced Options + CLR Chain
description: Detects complete CLR enablement attack chain
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=15457 AND (Message LIKE '%show advanced options%1%' OR Message LIKE '%clr enabled%1%')

title: Print Spooler Driver Installation - Mimispool/PrintNightmare
description: Detects print driver installation via Print Spooler, potentially Mimispool or PrintNightmare exploitation
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID IN (316, 300, 301, 823, 848, 849)

title: Printer FILE: Redirection - Data Exfiltration
description: Detects print redirection to FILE: which can be used for data exfiltration
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=823 AND NewDefaultPrinter LIKE '%FILE:%'

title: Printer Driver Installation by Non-Admin
description: Detects printer driver installation by non-privileged user - suspicious for PrintNightmare
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=300 AND UserID != 'S-1-5-18' AND UserID != 'S-1-5-19' AND UserID != 'S-1-5-20'

title: NTDS.DIT Access from Suspicious Path - Credential Access
description: Detects access to NTDS.DIT (AD database) from suspicious location like c:\hacker, c:\temp, etc.
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE (EventID=325 OR EventID=327) AND Message LIKE '%c:\\hacker\\%'

title: NTDS.DIT Copied via Volume Shadow Copy
description: Detects NTDS.DIT copy via Volume Shadow Copy (VSS) for credential dumping
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=216 AND Message LIKE '%HarddiskVolumeShadowCopy%' AND Message LIKE '%ntds.dit%'

title: Complete NTDS.DIT Dump Chain
description: Detects complete attack chain: VSS snapshot + NTDS access from suspicious path
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE (EventID=216 AND Message LIKE '%ntds.dit%') OR (EventID IN (325,327) AND Message LIKE '%c:\\hacker\\%')

title: SQL Server Audit Disabled - Defense Evasion
description: Detects when SQL Server audit is disabled
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%STATE = OFF%'

title: SQL Server Audit Destroyed - Evidence Cleanup
description: Detects when SQL Server audit object is destroyed
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%destroyed%'

title: Complete SQL Server Audit Tampering Chain
description: Detects complete audit tampering chain
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND (Message LIKE '%STATE = OFF%' OR Message LIKE '%destroyed%' OR Message LIKE '%LGIS%')
